title: Short  title
doc_html:
PART XII. CAMPUS ACCOUNTABILITY AND SAFETY

§3399.11. Short title

            This Part may be referred to as the "Campus Accountability and Safety Act".

            Acts 2015, No. 172, §1, eff. June 23, 2015; Acts 2021, No. 439, §2, eff. June 21, 2021; Acts 2021, No. 472, §2, eff. June 29, 2021.

PART XII.  CAMPUS ACCOUNTABILITY AND SAFETY
§3399.11.  Short title
This Part may be referred to as the "Campus Accountability and Safety Act".
Acts 2015, No. 172, §1, eff. June 23, 2015; Acts 2021, No. 439, §2, eff. June 21,
2021; Acts 2021, No. 472, §2, eff. June 29, 2021.
